_comment: Ogre:: in CODE is allowed only in allowed_dirs/allowed_files, in the
sanctioned entries below (each with its reason - the doc's residual
lists are the baseline) and inside ORKIGE_SANCTIONED_OGRE_BEGIN/END
blocks of sanctioned_block_files. Everything else fails the lint.
Adding a new Ogre-speaking file means editing THIS file in the same
change - that is the review speed bump the lint exists for.

sanctioned_dirs.orkige_engine/engine_fastgui: flavor-neutral UI zone since the DrawLayer2D port: math alias spellings + utilities present identically in both Ogre backends (ConfigFile, ResourceGroupManager names, StringConverter/StringUtil, IteratorWrapper); rendering goes through engine_render/DrawLayer2D
sanctioned_dirs.orkige_engine/engine_filesystem: Ogre::Archive/ArchiveFactory subclasses (BigZip) - the archive subsystem exists in Ogre-Next too; Filament gets an impl-side VFS

sanctioned_files.orkige_engine/engine_base/EngineLog.cpp: the engine log service pimpl - the ONE place above the backends talking to the logging backend (OGRE LogManager, also present in Next)
sanctioned_files.orkige_engine/engine_base/Localisation.h: Ogre::ConfigFile INI parsing (classic-only per audit; replace with an engine parser when touched)
sanctioned_files.orkige_engine/engine_base/Localisation.c: Ogre::ConfigFile INI parsing + entity-name probe (classic-only per audit)
math-only residue (tilt vectors) - alias vocabulary pending (math decision, Option A)
math-only residue (tilt vectors) - alias vocabulary pending
sanctioned_files.orkige_engine/engine_module/module.cpp: Lua math usertypes (Vector3/Vector2/Quaternion) = the engine math vocabulary per the RenderMath.h alias decision
sanctioned_files.orkige_engine/engine_physic/PhysicsWorld: math-only residue (Jolt<->engine math conversions) - alias vocabulary pending
math-only residue (Jolt<->engine math conversions) - alias vocabulary pending
sanctioned_files.orkige_engine/engine_sound/SoundSource.h: math-only residue (listener/source positions) - alias vocabulary pending
sanctioned_files.orkige_engine/engine_sound/LoadWavData.c: loads wav bytes through the resource system (Ogre::DataStream) - portable to Next; impl-side VFS on Filament
sanctioned_files.orkige_engine/engine_util/MeshUtil.h: backend-private vertex/index buffer extraction; only referenced by the unbuilt sceneoptimizer
backend-private ManualObject mesh building; called by the classic backend (createVertexColourCubeMesh)
sanctioned_files.orkige_engine/engine_util/StringConverte: math-adjacent converters - follow the math decision (aliases keep it working on both Ogre backends)
sanctioned_files.orkige_engine/engine_util/StringUtil.h: Ogre::DisplayString conversion for fastgui text (classic-gated; Next path uses the plain multibyte converter)
sanctioned_files.orkige_engine/engine_util/ResourceUtil.c: resource lookups over Ogre::ResourceGroupManager (findPath backs the .caf sound loader on both flavors; removeUnusedResources is classic-only)
sanctioned_files.samples/jumper/JumperLogic.h: math-only residue (pure gameplay math, unit-tested headlessly) - alias vocabulary pending
sanctioned_files.samples/jumper/JumperHud.h: one spelling: the resource-group default parameter forwarded to fastgui (documented in WP-A1.3)
sanctioned_files.tests/render_facade/bootstrap_classic.cp: the classic backend's bootstrap TU of the render_facade selfcheck - per-backend by design
sanctioned_files.tests/render_facade/bootstrap_next.cpp: the Ogre-Next backend's bootstrap TU of the render_facade selfcheck/smoke - per-backend by design
sanctioned_files.tests/engine/FastGuiAtlasTests.cpp: parses .ogui atlases through the UiAtlas headless constructor + Ogre::ConfigFile (present in both flavors)
sanctioned_files.tests/engine/TwoDSupportTests.cpp: math values + render-queue id constants (RENDER_QUEUE_MAIN) asserted against the pure helpers
sanctioned_files.tests/jumper/JumperLogicTests.cpp: math values (JumperLogic surface) - alias vocabulary pending
sanctioned_files.orkige_engine/engine_util/ConfigFileUtil: the ONE per-flavor seam of Ogre::ConfigFile section iteration (classic 14 vs Ogre-Next API drift) - consumed by the flavor-neutral fastgui loaders

sanctioned_block_files.orkige_engine/engine_gocomponent/Animati: root-motion backdoor (decided question #1): classic-only bone/keyframe digging inside #ifdef ORKIGE_RENDER_CLASSIC blocks
sanctioned_block_files.samples/hello_orkige/main.cpp: app-standard classic boot block (Engine ctor, ORKIGE_RENDERSYSTEM, RTSS internal media)
sanctioned_block_files.tools/editor/main.cpp: app-standard classic boot block only (Engine ctor, ORKIGE_RENDERSYSTEM, RTSS internal media) - the WP-A1.4 editor glue (ImGuiOverlay/OverlaySystem, UI viewport, grid ManualObject) was replaced by facade API in the editor-on-Next port (ImGuiFacadeRenderer/showUIOnlyWindow/createLineListMesh)
